title: TKVM Enemies: Undead
description: Undead mobs with Epic Knight Armor and weaponry (Made for FalchionMC)
body:
# *Disclaimer* 
This mod is intended for use in the modpack : FalchionMC
If the dependencies are not installed, it will not work! 

## Curseforge Dependencies

Mods: 
 #### (Most dependencies should be autodownloaded from modrinth) 

- [Epic Fight Resurrection 20.12.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-resurrection/files/6931390)
- [Indestructible 20.12.0](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-indestructible/files/6915161)
_Make sure in configs to set indestructible-client.toml replace_health_bar = 1 -> replace_health_bar = 0 Or else it will crash_

## Structure Dependency: 
- [Huge Structure Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/huge-structure-blocks/version/t2Zt3WNi)

## Server
- SERVER SIDE , do not install on client [Indestructible Server Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/indestructible-server-fix/download/6842125) 

This mod adds a variety of undead mobs intended to add challenging enemies that make use of Epic Fight's combat system. 

Brigadine Zombie
A heavy-weight zombie, with a strong swing, and substantial health.
![Brigandine Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubVDwG03/images/03849acf4e5916ed8a7db62957ab75931de0b63f.jpeg)

Ironclad Zombie
A super-heavy zombie , that is immune to stun, and has devestating, but slow attacks.
![Ironclad Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubVDwG03/images/ec87153b045df6f62fc9397a0e84dea2f1bf5ea8.jpeg)

Engarde Skeleton
A swift dodging skeleton with low health, and poking attacks.
![Engarde Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubVDwG03/images/cef49fdf5715ae5f67647e71b3ed39c7ff279188.jpeg)

Mercenary Zombie
A longsword wielding zombie with quick strikes and medium health.
![Mercenary Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubVDwG03/images/0fb5327cec89e31435e276c66080d8bb800a0357.jpeg)

Reaper
A scythe-wielding wither skeleton with high health that spawns in the nether. 
![Reaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubVDwG03/images/b06a602400ea21ee562bd18157a9fc9e616d6e93.jpeg)
